_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor growth of neurofibromin-deficient cells is driven by decreased respiration and hampered by NAD

_contextSnippet: In vivo, neoplastic growth of MPNST cells is inhibited by SIRT3 overexpression or treatment of mice with NIC, as well as by TRAP1 knock-out
details: In vivo neoplastic growth of MPNST cells inhibited by SIRT3 overexpression, NIC treatment, and TRAP1 knock-out
